position: Full Stack Engineer - MCP & Micro App Development
experience_requirements: 5+ years in software engineering, ideally in SaaS or media tech environments
soft_skills: responsiveness to UX and product feedback
key_responsibilities: Design and implement MCP connectors for media systems and metadata workflows
Develop dynamic schema mediation using AI-driven orchestration and feedback loops
Build micro frontends and modular UI components for Dalet media platforms
Integrate frontend layers with backend MCP servers and cloud infrastructure
Optimize performance, accessibility, and maintainability across micro apps
Work with SRE and DevOps teams on scalable microservices and CI/CD delivery
Contribute to infrastructure-as-code practices with Terraform, Helm, and Kubernetes
success_outcomes: Scalable modular applications that work across media platforms
Reliable API interactions for media file transfers and metadata transformation
Frontend experiences that are responsive, accessible, and maintainable
Cloud-native services that deploy smoothly through CI/CD pipelines
AI-assisted schema learning that improves adaptive system behavior
must_have_checklist: Strong proficiency with modern frontend frameworks
Experience with MCP servers and tools
Hands-on Kubernetes, Terraform, and cloud-native architectures
Familiarity with AI orchestration, schema mediation, and LLM-based workflows
Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills
